item.title: The Hypocrisy of Angry Straight Men - The Chive Loves/Hates Me
item.description: My New YouTube Video is Up! Take a deep dive with me into the comments section of The Chive, and learn all the methods angry straight men have learned to cope with trans women existing. Or heaven forbid, exist and accidentally find one of them hot. Really proud of this video and hope it gives you some fresh insight! https://youtu.be/yrCnr0V9qZ8 Again, I post these here because I am encouraged to do so, and I feel like the messaging in this video eventually comes around to something I hope folks can listen to or relate to. Thank you all for letting expand outside my comfort zone lately and into all forms of creation!
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: What Happened Today #117
item.description: ? The price tags are no longer hidden. Million-dollar fundraisers buy private photo ops with the Vice President while Trump's company raises billions for bitcoin as he promotes crypto through presidential policy. The corruption isn't creeping anymore. It's a stampede of cash buying pardons, policies, and access with the subtlety of a strip mall auction. Meanwhile, don't rely on the algorithm. Let me send this free and private summary to you every night so that you never miss what's going on. Add your email on the homepage of GovBrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/doge-treasury-access 2. https://go.govbrief.today/ivey-denited-access 3. https://go.govbrief.today/golden-dome-canada 4. https://go.govbrief.today/us-steel-deal 5. https://go.govbrief.today/pulte-fed-rates 6. https://go.govbrief.today/us-argentina-who 7. https://go.govbrief.today/covid-vaccine-changes 8. https://go.govbrief.today/missouri-abortions-halted 9. https://go.govbrief.today/california-sports-trans 10. https://go.govbrief.today/student-visa-scheduling 11. https://go.govbrief.today/cut-ties-harvard 12. https://go.govbrief.today/interior-official-escorted-out 13. https://go.govbrief.today/defense-ends-doge-email 14. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-scotus-south-sudan 15. https://go.govbrief.today/nc-voting-records 16. https://go.govbrief.today/scotus-oak-flat 17. https://go.govbrief.today/wilmerhale-struck-down 18. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-freeze-nyc-blocked 19. https://go.govbrief.today/homan-geo-group 20. https://go.govbrief.today/walczak-pardon-post-fundraiser 21. https://go.govbrief.today/vance-trump-pac 22. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-buying-bitcoin Yesterday's Story - https://go.govbrief.today/fbi-invesigating-past-cases Fighting Back - https://go.govbrief.today/visibility-brigade-toolkit
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Mermay day 28, mulberry! [OC]
item.description:
The mulberry mermaid! I love mulberries so much, I’ve only ever had them once, fresh off a tree while I was on a holiday in Italy- Been chasing that high ever since!
We have completed four whole weeks of mermay! But we’re not done yet, this month has 31 days, so we’ve got three more to go ;D Let’s have our usual weekly recap:
Week one!
Week two!
Week three and…
Week four!!! Now that’s a lot of fish isn’t it? If you like my stuff and want to see more, come support me on Patreon! —> https://www.patreon.com/AmyRevives
item.dc:creator: AmyRevives

item.title: The Labor Department yanked Biden-era guidance that strongly discouraged employers against offering cryptocurrency in workers’ 401(k) plan options.
item.description: This comes a day after Trump Media says it’s raising $2.5 billion to buy bitcoin. https://www.cnbc.com/2025/05/27/djt-trump-media-bitcoin.html Addressing some comments about this, The policy is dangerous because it allows your 401k plan to buy crypto. So you may own Vanguard retirement fund and you do not get to decide which stocks are included in your retirement fund. This means crypto risk is now distributed across every person with a 401k plan, you don't get to chose if every company sponsored plan has crypto investment.
item.dc:creator: Grogu007

item.title: I'm a hungry girl ok?
item.description: It was very delicious, it was very artistic, the wine was great, the service was perfect, overall a lovely experience that I am truly grateful for. I think the bill was 300 including the tip. But I was still kinda hungry.... Luckily my friend felt the same way ? So we had some amazing 4€ fries with mayonnaise afterwards.

item.dc:creator: DropDrop

item.title: Hînqumemen, the sentient lake from Native American mythology [world mythology post 637]!
item.description:
(image source: Su Jian, this is actually an illustration of an unrelated water spirit) This might genuinely be the most unique creature I’ve written about. The Native American Coeur d’Alénes people have a story about a lake monster they call the Hînqumemen, also referred to as ‘the Engulfer’. What sets this creature apart from other lake monsters is that the Hînqumemen *is* the lake. The entire body of water is a single, sentient being. The Coeur d’Alénes people greatly fear the lake and avoid it, as the Hînqumemen is a vengeful creature. When unknowing travelers collect water from it, the lake erupts from the ground and actively pursues them. The victims soon find themselves engulfed by this aqueous opponent, which forcefully drags them back before drowning them.
Interestingly, there doesn’t seem to be any mention of the location of this lake. What’s more, the author I cite below also mentions the Native American people in British Columbia in Canada, although a lake cannot exist in several places at once. Therefore, I assume this legend is more of a cautionary tale or a scary story to tell around campfires. Source: Dixon-Kennedy, M., 1998, Native American Myth & Legend: An A-Z of People and Places, Brockhampton Press, p. 110, 288 pp.
item.dc:creator: Bestiarium
